title: Introduction Introduction
excerpt:
Hello beautiful people, I’m new here.

posts.author: MullerKlaus (xdaki kings)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello beautiful people, I’m new here.
Is anyone available to show me around?

Cheers.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome! Check out learning resources at Help Center. You can take courses/ read articles or watch videos - super helpful when getting started! Also roam around the community for more insights.

In the future, for general question make sure to post in the FAQ/ or relevant category! ( Since this sections is for feature request)

Happy you joined the community
